creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Lars,

Thanks for your patch, is this something you use?
It looks like we should probably use Debian's repo as a source if we want to keep this around which also includes a patch for this issue. Is that something you'd be interested in looking into?

https://salsa.debian.org/pkg-security-team/dsniff/-/tree/debian/master?ref_type=heads

Best regards,
Daniel
